title: Explore: Architecture
description: Map Phase 2 implementation boundaries in Rust core, CLI, Tauri commands, Vue API/app, and FinderSync. Read only; do not edit files.
result_json: {"status":"completed","angle":"architecture","findings":["Phase 2 scope in docs/requirements.md:196-218 is file-operation oriented: copy variants, trash/delete, folder create/dissolve, file info, and default confirmation for dangerous actions; docs/design.md:20-32 keeps the Phase 1 communication model as Tauri config -> FinderSync menu -> CLI -> sright-core -> JSONL logs.","Rust core boundary is currently minimal and action-centric: crates/sright-core/src/actions.rs only dispatches debug.echo; config.rs exposes SRightConfig/MenuItem with enabled/show_icons/merge_groups/menus; logging.rs owns JSONL action logs; paths.rs owns app-support/config/log/FinderSync mirror paths. Phase 2 file semantics should land here before CLI/Tauri/FinderSync adapters grow.","CLI boundary is a thin adapter in crates/sright-cli/src/main.rs: it parses action run --id/--path, loads config, blocks disabled or absent menu IDs, executes sright-core, and logs success/failure. It can already pass multi-select paths, but error logging currently records selected_count as 0 on execute_action failure, so file-operation failures may lose context unless fixed.","Tauri boundary in apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs mirrors config/log APIs but has a hard-coded run_debug_action command. Vue API in apps/desktop/src/lib/api.ts and App.vue only models MenuItem id/title/enabled plus global toggles and recent logs. Phase 2 UI should remain config/diagnostics focused, but needs schema fields for dangerous confirmation and new action toggles instead of action execution logic.","FinderSync boundary in native/macos/FinderSyncExtension/FinderSync.swift is the largest Phase 2 gate: it hard-codes debug.echo, renders at most one menu item, and invokes runDebugEcho. To expose Phase 2 actions it must iterate enabled config.menus, bind each NSMenuItem to its action id, collect selectedItemURLs, and call sright-cli action run --id <id> --path ... generically.","Existing tests cover default config, debug echo, JSONL tailing, CLI config init/print, and CLI debug action logging only. There is no test coverage yet for file operations, action registry metadata, dangerous defaults, multi-action menu config, FinderSync menu generation behavior, or Tauri schema compatibility."],"files":["/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/.workflow/.maestro/ralph-20260519-194440/wave-0-results.csv","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/docs/requirements.md","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/docs/design.md","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/actions.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/config.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/logging.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/paths.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-cli/src/main.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/apps/desktop/src/lib/api.ts","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/apps/desktop/src/App.vue","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/native/macos/FinderSyncExtension/FinderSync.swift","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/tests/core_smoke.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-cli/tests/cli_smoke.rs"],"risks":["Schema drift risk: Rust SRightConfig/MenuItem, TypeScript interfaces, and Swift Decodable structs duplicate the same config contract, so Phase 2 fields can desync across core, Tauri, Vue, and FinderSync.","FinderSync sandbox/permissions risk: entitlements currently include sandbox and user-selected read-only; destructive actions run through the bundled or installed CLI, so deletion/trash behavior needs validation in the packaged app path, not only cargo tests.","Dangerous-action UX risk: FinderSync cannot easily show rich confirmations; default confirmation policy may need CLI-level blocking, Tauri-configurable flags, or a native alert path before permanent delete is enabled.","Clipboard and file-operation dependency risk: current Rust core dependencies are only serde/serde_json/thiserror, so copy-to-clipboard, trash, shell escaping, metadata, and delete behavior will require carefully chosen macOS-compatible APIs or small dependencies.","Menu scalability risk: show_icons and merge_groups exist in config but are unused by FinderSync; adding many Phase 2 actions without grouping/metadata can create a flat, hard-to-maintain menu."],"recommendations":["Start Phase 2 by defining a single action registry/model in sright-core: stable action ids, titles, dangerous flag, selection requirements, and enabled defaults; derive default_config menus from it so CLI/Tauri/FinderSync consume one source of truth.","Implement file operations in sright-core behind execute_action first, with focused tests for single/multi-select, missing paths, realpath resolution, shell escaping, folder dissolve edge cases, trash/delete behavior, and failure log context.","Refactor CLI only as needed: preserve action run --id/--path, keep config gating, log selected_count from the original request on failures, and add tests for disabled action, unknown action, and a representative Phase 2 action.","Refactor FinderSync from debug-only to generic config-driven menu generation: attach action id to NSMenuItem.representedObject or equivalent, use one handler, pass selected paths to CLI, and honor enabled plus later show_icons/merge_groups semantics.","Keep Tauri/Vue as the preferences and diagnostics surface: extend the shared TypeScript config types, render Phase 2 action toggles and dangerous confirmation settings, remove or quarantine debug-only UI once generic actions exist, and avoid adding unrelated frontend state libraries until the UI complexity actually needs them."]}

title: Explore: Tests
description: Map current test infrastructure and propose tests-first verification commands for Phase 2. Read only; do not edit files.
result_json: {"status":"completed","angle":"tests","findings":["当前测试基础主要在 Rust：`crates/sright-core/tests/core_smoke.rs` 覆盖 config 初始化/保存、`debug.echo`、JSONL append/tail；`crates/sright-cli/tests/cli_smoke.rs` 覆盖 CLI config init/print、action run、logs tail。","根 `package.json` 只有 `test:rust`=`cargo test --workspace` 和 `desktop:typecheck`；`README.md` 同步列出 `cargo fmt --all --check`、`cargo test --workspace`、CLI smoke commands、`pnpm --filter @sright/desktop typecheck`。","前端没有 Vitest/Playwright/ESLint 脚本，`apps/desktop/package.json` 只有 Vite build 和 `vue-tsc --noEmit`；Phase 2 UI 变更目前可先用 typecheck/build 验证，除非抽出复杂配置逻辑再引入单元测试。","Swift FinderSync 工程只有 `SRightFinderSync` app extension target，未发现 XCTest target；当前更适合用 `xcodebuild ... build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` 作为编译验证，再配合手动 Finder smoke。","Ralph wave-0 明确 Phase 2 条件：先锁定 action id/schema、危险动作确认默认值、文件删除/移废纸篓 macOS 边界，并补多选/单选、失败日志、危险动作默认确认测试。","Phase 2 测试应 tests-first 从 Rust contract 开始：动作模型/路径转换/文件变更/危险动作 gating/日志失败语义先写失败测试，再实现。"],"files":["/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/package.json","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/apps/desktop/package.json","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/README.md","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/Cargo.toml","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/tests/core_smoke.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-cli/tests/cli_smoke.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/actions.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/config.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-core/src/logging.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/crates/sright-cli/src/main.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/native/macos/FinderSyncExtension/FinderSync.swift","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/native/macos/sRightNative.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/docs/requirements.md","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/docs/design.md","/Users/minfengsun/sunminfeng/self/toy/sRight/.workflow/.maestro/ralph-20260519-194440/wave-0-results.csv"],"risks":["运行 `cargo test`、`pnpm build`、`xcodebuild` 会生成 `target/`、`dist/` 或 Xcode DerivedData；本次按只读要求未执行验证命令，只做测试基础映射。","文件操作测试如果直接碰真实 Finder 选择、真实 Trash 或永久删除，容易产生不可逆副作用；应优先用 temp dirs、adapter/trait 或显式 confirm gate 隔离。","当前 config schema 只有 `MenuItem { id,title,enabled }`，还没有危险确认字段；若先实现 UI/Swift 菜单再补 schema 测试，容易出现跨层 action id 或默认值不一致。","CLI 当前失败日志 selected_count 在 `execute_action` error 分支写 0，Phase 2 多选失败场景可能需要保留传入路径数；建议先测试并确认预期。","无 Swift XCTest 与前端 test runner，FinderSync 菜单生成、Tauri command 与 UI 交互存在只能靠 build/typecheck/manual smoke 的覆盖缺口。"],"recommendations":["Phase 2 红线先写 Rust tests：`cargo test -p sright-core` 覆盖 copy path/realpath/filename/parent/shell-escaped path 的单选与多选，覆盖 file info、按文件名建文件夹、解散文件夹的 temp-dir 行为。","危险动作先写失败测试：默认 config 下 `trash`/`delete_permanently` 无确认时被阻止并写 failure log；显式 confirm 后才允许执行；永久删除只在 temp dir fixture 中验证。","CLI tests-first 命令：新增/扩展 `crates/sright-cli/tests/cli_smoke.rs` 后运行 `SRIGHT_APP_SUPPORT_DIR=$(mktemp -d) cargo test -p sright-cli --test cli_smoke -- --nocapture`，重点覆盖多 `--path`、disabled menu、unknown action、危险动作未确认、失败日志。","核心快速回归命令：`cargo fmt --all --check`、`cargo test -p sright-core`、`cargo test -p sright-cli --test cli_smoke`、最终 `cargo test --workspace`。","前端/Tauri 验证命令：`pnpm --filter @sright/desktop typecheck`；涉及打包或 Tauri command wiring 时再跑 `pnpm --filter @sright/desktop build` 或 `pnpm --filter @sright/desktop tauri build`。","FinderSync 编译验证命令：`xcodebuild -project native/macos/sRightNative.xcodeproj -scheme SRightFinderSync -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`；无 test target 时保留手动 smoke：构造 config、设置 `SRIGHT_CLI_PATH`、Finder 右键触发并检查 `actions.jsonl`。","暂不急着引入 Vitest/Playwright；如果 Phase 2 偏好页新增危险确认开关和菜单配置表单，先把可纯函数化的 config transform 抽出，再用最小测试框架补针对性单测。"]}
